rule_metadata.name: PNG_dropper
rule_metadata.author: CarbonBlack Threat Research
rule_metadata.description: Dropper tool that extracts payload from PNG resources

rules.rule_text:
rule PNG_dropper : RU TR APT
{
	meta:
		author = "CarbonBlack Threat Research"
		date = "2017-June-11"
		description = "Dropper tool that extracts payload from PNG resources"
		reference = "https://www.carbonblack.com/2017/08/18/threat-analysis-carbon-black-threat-research-dissects-png-dropper/"
		yara_version = "3.5.0"
		exemplar_hashes = "3a5918c69b6ee801ab8bfc4fc872ac32cc96a47b53c3525723cc27f150e0bfa3, 69389f0d35d003ec3c9506243fd264afefe099d99fcc0e7d977007a12290a290, eeb7784b77d86627bac32e4db20da382cb4643ff8eb86ab1abaebaa56a650158 "

	strings:
		$s1 = "GdipGetImageWidth"
		$s2 = "GdipGetImageHeight"
		$s3 = "GdipCreateBitmapFromStream"
		$s4 = "GdipCreateBitmapFromStreamICM"
		$s5 = "GdipBitmapLockBits"
		$s6 = "GdipBitmapUnlockBits"
		$s7 = "LockResource"
		$s8 = "LoadResource"
		$s9 = "ExpandEnvironmentStringsW"
		$s10 = "SetFileTime"
		$s11 = "memcmp"
		$s12 = "strlen"
		$s13 = "memcpy"
		$s14 = "memchr"
		$s15 = "memmove"
		$s16 = "ZwQueryValueKey"
		$s17 = "ZwQueryInformationProcess"
		$s18 = "FindNextFile"
		$s19 = "GetModuleHandle"
		$s20 = "VirtualFree"
		$PNG1 = {89 50 4E 47 [8] 49 48 44 52}
		$bin32_bit1 = {50 68 07 10 06 00 6A 07 8?}
		$bin64_bit1 = {41 B? 07 10 06 00}
		$bin64_bit2 = {41 B? 07 00 00 00}
		$bin32_virt1 = {6A 40 68 00 10 00 00 50 53}
		$bin64_virt1 = {40 41 B? 00 10 00 00}

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and filesize < 6MB and 18 of ( $s* ) and ( #PNG1 > 7 ) and ( ( #bin32_bit1 > 1 and $bin32_virt1 ) or ( for 1 of ( $bin64_bit* ) : ( # > 2 ) and $bin64_virt1 ) )
}
